name: quant-finance-product-research
description: Repo-local Codex product direction research skill bundle for the finance workspace in quant-data-pipeline.

interface.longDescription: Repo-local plugin bundle for finance product direction research orchestration, current-product audit, external benchmark research, UI and workflow pattern synthesis, feature opportunity prioritization, recommendation handoff, and research bundle validation in quant-data-pipeline.
defaultPrompt: Create and validate a finance product research bundle.
Audit the finance product and identify sourced feature opportunities.
Research comparable quant products and extract UI/workflow patterns.
Turn audit and benchmark evidence into prioritized roadmap candidates.
